antispoof-desc: Wuxuu xannibayaa samaynta koontooyinka wata magacyada isticmaalaha ee faraha isku dhex qasan, wareerka keena, ama isu eg
antispoof-conflict-top: Magaca isticmaalaha "$1" wuxuu aad ugu dhow yahay {{PLURAL:$2|magaca isticmaalaha|magacyada isticmaalaha}} ee soo socda:
antispoof-name-illegal:
Si looga fogaado jahwareer, magaca isticmaalaha "$1" lama isticmaali karo: $2.
Fadlan dooro magac isticmaale oo kale.
antispoof-badtype: Nooca magaca isticmaalaha ee la bixiyey sax ma aha
antispoof-empty: Lama bixin wax magac isticmaale ah
antispoof-prohibited: Magacyada isticmaalaha ma ku jiri karaan xarafka "$1" sababtoo ah waa mamnuuc
antispoof-combining: Magacyada isticmaalaha ma ku jiri karaan xarafka la isku daro ee "$1"
antispoof-unassigned: Magacyada isticmaalaha ma ku jiri karaan xarafka "$1" sababtoo ah waa xaraf aan la aqoon
antispoof-deprecated: Magacyada isticmaalaha ma ku jiri karaan xarafka "$1" sababtoo ah waa mid duugoobay oo la reebay
antispoof-mixedscripts: Magacyada isticmaalaha ma ku jiri karaan xarfo ka yimid nidaamyo qoraal oo kala duwan
antispoof-tooshort: Magaca isticmaalaha aad bixisay aad buu u gaaban yahay
antispoof-ignore: Iska indho tir baarista is daba marinta
antispoof-ignore-help: Wuxuu u oggolaanayaa isticmaalayaasha leh awoodaha ku filan inay samayn karaan koonto, xataa haddii magaceedu uu u eg yahay magaca koonto horay u jirtay.
